generated_oml:
instance DS18S20AmbientTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring ambient temperature with range -55°C to +125°C and accuracy 0.5°C from -10°C to +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AmbientTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance DS18S20BoxAirTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring internal box air temperature with range -55°C to +125°C and accuracy 0.5°C from -10°C to +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData BoxAirTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance DS18S20HeatbedTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring heatbed temperature with range -55°C to +125°C and accuracy 0.5°C from -10°C to +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HeatbedTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance AmbientTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DS18S20AmbientTemperatureSensor
]

instance BoxAirTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DS18S20BoxAirTemperatureSensor
]

instance HeatbedTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DS18S20HeatbedTemperatureSensor
]

instance AmbientTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time ambient temperature readings from DS18S20 sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AmbientTemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationTool, RabbitMQBroker
]

instance BoxAirTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time internal box air temperature readings from DS18S20 sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData BoxAirTemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationTool, RabbitMQBroker
]

instance HeatbedTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time heatbed temperature readings from DS18S20 sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HeatbedTemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationTool, RabbitMQBroker
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal model with 2 parameters calibrated using non-linear least squares solver"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationTool
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal model with 4 parameters calibrated using non-linear least squares solver"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationTool
]

instance RabbitMQBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for communication between physical sensors and digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTransmissionService, SafetyMonitoringService, TemperaturePredictionService, StateEstimationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance ScipyCalibrationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy package for parameter calibration via non-linear least squares solver"
    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimationService
]

instance RaspberryPiEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller for processing sensor data and actuating components"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeControlService
]

instance GitHubRepository : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Open-source GitHub repository for hardware and software specifications"
    DTDFVocab:enables DevelopmentService
]

instance TemperaturePredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation models for temperature prediction using dynamic thermal models"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight
]

instance SafetyMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Monitoring for safety and optimization using real-time sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyAlertInsight, OptimizationInsight
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "State estimation via calibration algorithms using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection for sensor and component failures"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance RealTimeControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time control of heatbed and fan using model-based predictions"
    DTDFVocab:provides HeatbedActuationAction, FanActuationAction
]

instance DevelopmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Development of dynamic models and calibration via Scipy optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelDevelopmentInsight
]

instance DataTransmissionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Transmission of sensor data via RabbitMQ message broker"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTransmissionStatusInsight
]

instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature values based on dynamic thermal models"
]

instance SafetyAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alert for unsafe temperature conditions"
]

instance OptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal settings for heatbed and fan to maintain desired temperature"
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of sensor or component faults"
]

instance ModelDevelopmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights from model development and calibration process"
]

instance DataTransmissionStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Status of data transmission from physical sensors to digital twin"
]

instance HeatbedActuationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Control signal to heatbed via MOSFETs for heating adjustment"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FanActuationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Control signal to fan for airflow adjustment"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ThermalIncubatorEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Thermal incubator system consisting of styrofoam box, heatbed, fan, sensors, Raspberry Pi, PCB, and power supply"
    base:contains StyrofoamBox, HeatbedActuator, FanActuator, RaspberryPiComponent, PCBAssembly, PowerSupply
]

instance StyrofoamBox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container with air volume of 0.03 m³"
]

instance HeatbedActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed controlled via MOSFETs to handle 4A current for heating"
]

instance FanActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan operating at 12V/24V with airflow 0.02 m³/s controlled via optocouplers"
]

instance RaspberryPiComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller for system management"
]

instance PCBAssembly : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for safe actuation control"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply unit for the thermal incubator system"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Controller sends commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan speed adjustments) via RabbitMQ to the low-level driver, which executes hardware actuation through MOSFETs and optocouplers based on control logic."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated components include RabbitMQ server (on Raspberry Pi), low-level driver, controller, and simulation models; information flow between physical twin and digital twin occurs via RabbitMQ messages as depicted in Figure 7."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin integrates post-deployment, covering the 'as operated' phase of the physical twin's lifecycle, as models are maintained and updated during operational use."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model B better predicts thermal inertia of heatbed; validation via sensor experiments (e.g., temperature uniformity tests with three sensors); residual error minimized through non-linear least squares calibration."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for communication; Raspberry Pi uses built-in Wi-Fi and Bluetooth for network connectivity; 1-Wire bus for sensor communication with GPIO."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Digital twin components hosted on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B, with RabbitMQ server running locally on the same device for synchronization and communication."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Low-level driver incorporates safe protocol for device safety; optocouplers decouple control signals from Raspberry Pi to MOSFETs for electrical isolation; no explicit cybersecurity measures detailed."
]
